revision.text:
{{Location | Name=Fresno | Guid=3035-8212 | Deck=A city in California and the home of Fresno State University. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Fresno_State_Bulldogs | Objects= | Locations=Locations/California,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3603042-fresno-brown-wave-l.jpg}}

{{Location | Name=Futuristic City Planet | Guid=3035-8153 | Deck=The '''Futuristic City Planet''' is a fictional planet appearing in the the Sega Mega Drive–Genesis version of Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Tournament Fighters. Located in Dimension X, it is where Clone Donatello is fought. | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> The '''Futuristic City Planet''' is a fictional planet appearing in the the Sega Mega Drive–Genesis version of Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Tournament Fighters. Located in Dimension X, it is where Clone Donatello is fought.

{{Location | Name=Gainesville | Guid=3035-8210 | Deck=A city in Florida and the home of the University of Florida. | Characters=Characters/Vernon_Maxwell | Concepts=Concepts/Florida_Gators | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Florida,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3614333-2457035571-Gaine.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3614333-2457035571-Gaine.jpg","path":"0\/1992\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_tiny,square_small,square_medium,square_avatar,scale_super,scale_small,scale_medium,square_mini,screen_medium,scale_large,scale_avatar,screen_kubrick","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> A city in Florida and the home of the University of Florida.

{{Location | Name=Gambia | Guid=3035-7995 | Deck=The Gambia is a republic in Western Africa. Its capital city is Banjul. | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> The Gambia is a republic in Western Africa. Its capital city is Banjul.

{{Location | Name=Gamma Halo | Guid=3035-7944 | Deck=Installation 03, also known as Gamma Halo, is one of the seven ring-shaped superweapons that comprise the Forerunners' Halo Array. Located in orbit of Doavyn. Installation 03's monitor is 049 Abject Testament. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Covenant_Elite,Concepts/Covenant_Grunt,Concepts/Jackals,Concepts/Promethean_Crawler,Concepts/Promethean_Knight,Concepts/Promethean_Watcher,Concepts/Super_Weapon,Concepts/The_Covenant,Concepts/The_Forerunners | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Alpha_Halo,Locations/Delta_Halo,Locations/Halo,Locations/Jungle,Locations/Volcanic_Terrain,Locations/Volcano,Locations/Zeta_Halo | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/52/520822/3439635-4270346565-H4-Co.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3439635-4270346565-H4-Co.jpg","path":"52\/520822\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_medium,scale_small,square_medium,square_avatar,square_small,square_mini,scale_super,square_tiny,screen_kubrick,scale_avatar,screen_medium,scale_large","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Installation 03, also known as Gamma Halo, is one of the seven ring-shaped superweapons that comprise the Forerunners' Halo Array. Located in orbit of Doavyn. Installation 03's monitor is 049 Abject Testament.

{{Location | Name=Goo Lagoon | Guid=3035-8047 | Deck=A subarea of Numeria which appears in The ClueFinders 3rd Grade Adventures: Mystery of Mathra. | Characters=Characters/Goo_Creature,Characters/Goocifer,Characters/Liverpuddlians,Characters/Spit_Spot,Characters/The_Centipede,Characters/The_Flower,Characters/Tree,Characters/Twin_Spiders,Characters/Vine_50654,Characters/Yellow_Matter | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Numeria | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/7/73970/3464007-7423595385-latest.png}}

{{Location | Name=Gradius | Guid=3035-8183 | Deck=The titular planet of the Gradius series from Konami. | Characters=Characters/David_Burton,Characters/Dr_Venom,Characters/James_Burton | Concepts=Concepts/Titular_Location | Objects=Objects/Metalion,Objects/Vic_Viper | Locations=Locations/Space | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/16/164924/3593207-2741029813-latest.jpg}}

{{Location | Name=Grand Central Station | Guid=3035-8074 | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Manhattan,Locations/New_York_City }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Location | Name=Grand Valley Speedway | Guid=3035-7980 | Deck=Grand Valley Speedway is one of the original tracks of the Gran Turismo series, appearing in every main entry except for Gran Turismo Sport. | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/1/14876/3448629-jgts-grand_valley.gif}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3448629-jgts-grand_valley.gif","path":"1\/14876\/","mime":"image\/gif","sizes":"scale_medium,scale_super,square_small,square_medium,scale_small,square_avatar,square_mini,square_tiny,scale_tiny,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_avatar,screen_medium","caption":"Grand Valley Speedway GT1 to GT3"},"background":[]}' /> The layout has seen many changes over the years; the original version appeared from the first game until Gran Turismo 3. The second version appeared from Gran Turismo 4 to 6, with drastic changes made to the surrounding geometry and two of its corners. Finally, the track was entirely reimagined for Gran Turismo 7, now located on public roads on the California shoreline with obvious nods to the Bixby Creek Bridge, and renamed Grand Valley Highway 1.

<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Location | Name=Gyu-Kaku | Guid=3035-8110 | Deck=Gyu-Kaku is a real-life Japanese barbecue spot that specializes in grilled steaks. | Characters=Characters/Kazuma_Kiryu | Concepts=Concepts/Healing_Food,Concepts/Health,Concepts/Ordering_Food,Concepts/Product_Placement,Concepts/Recoverable_Health | Objects=Objects/Barbecue_Grill,Objects/Bulgogi,Objects/Cheese,Objects/Chopsticks,Objects/Fork,Objects/Knife,Objects/Meat,Objects/Napkin,Objects/Napkin_Dispenser,Objects/Rice,Objects/Soda_Fountain,Objects/Spoon | Locations=Locations/Asia,Locations/Earth,Locations/Japan,Locations/Los_Angeles,Locations/North_America,Locations/Shopping_Mall,Locations/The_Milky_Way_Galaxy,Locations/The_United_States_of_America,Locations/Tokyo | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3504108-restaurant_orl110117c-2048x1152.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3504108-restaurant_orl110117c-2048x1152.jpg","path":"8\/82962\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_small,square_small,square_medium,square_avatar,scale_super,square_tiny,scale_medium,square_mini,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_avatar,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Gyu-Kaku is a real-life Japanese barbecue spot that specializes in grilled steaks.

{{Location | Name=Hallownest | Guid=3035-8076 | Deck=Hallownest is the location where Hollow Knight takes place. Once a thriving kingdom in the middle of a wasteland, it has fallen into ruin in the wake of the Infection. | Characters=Characters/Hornet_51267,Characters/The_Hollow_Knight,Characters/The_Knight_51269 | Concepts=Concepts/Disease,Concepts/Exploration,Concepts/Insectoid_Humanoid,Concepts/Search_Action | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Cave,Locations/Temple_Ruins,Locations/Underground | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/52/520822/3484985-5002035940-1000.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3484985-5002035940-1000.jpg","path":"52\/520822\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_medium,scale_super,scale_small,square_avatar,square_medium,square_small,square_mini,square_tiny,screen_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_avatar","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Hallownest is the location where Hollow Knight takes place. Once a thriving kingdom in the middle of a wasteland, it has fallen into ruin in the wake of the Infection.

<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Location | Name=Heaven's Egg | Guid=3035-7964 | Deck=Gigantic sphere containing futuristic, derelict buildings along with monsters and dragons. It materialized one day on the Spring Seaslight in Harvestella. | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/20/202039/3445119-2022110616510800-e0a513f2ff231ca5e32e8423db190112.jpg}}

{{Location | Name=Hood River County | Guid=3035-8360 | Deck=Hood River County is a county named after its largest city, Hood River, in Oregon. | Characters=Characters/Addy_Walker,Characters/Boozer,Characters/Deacon_St_John,Characters/Iron_Mike,Characters/Rikki_Patil,Characters/Skizzo | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Earth,Locations/Lost_Lake,Locations/Lost_Lake_Resort,Locations/Mount_Hood_National_Forest,Locations/North_America,Locations/Oregon,Locations/The_Milky_Way_Galaxy,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3732378-slider-02_web.jpg}}

{{Location | Name=Humboldt County | Guid=3035-8011 | Deck=Humboldt County is a coastal area in Northern California known for Humboldt University and the large amounts of recreational marijuana use. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Military,Concepts/United_States_Army,Concepts/United_States_National_Guard | Objects=Objects/Apple,Objects/Avocado,Objects/Beer,Objects/Cider,Objects/Cigarette,Objects/Giant_Redwoods,Objects/Marijuana,Objects/Red_Bull,Objects/Tree | Locations=Locations/California,Locations/Earth,Locations/Eureka,Locations/McDonalds,Locations/Military_Base,Locations/North_America,Locations/Pacific_Ocean,Locations/The_Milky_Way_Galaxy,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3456839-humboldt_bay_and_eureka_aerial_view.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3456839-humboldt_bay_and_eureka_aerial_view.jpg","path":"8\/82962\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_mini,square_avatar,square_small,scale_medium,scale_small,square_medium,square_tiny,scale_super,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_avatar,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Humboldt County is a coastal area in Northern California known for Humboldt University and the large amounts of recreational marijuana use.

{{Location | Name=Ice Planet | Guid=3035-8154 | Deck=The '''Ice Planet''' is a fictional planet appearing in the the Sega Mega Drive–Genesis version of Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Tournament Fighters. Located in Dimension X, it is where Clone Casey Jones is fought. | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> The '''Ice Planet''' is a fictional planet appearing in the the Sega Mega Drive–Genesis version of Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Tournament Fighters. Located in Dimension X, it is where Clone Casey Jones is fought.

{{Location | Name=Indian Ocean | Guid=3035-8310 | Deck=The Indian Ocean is the third-largest ocean on Earth. | Characters=Characters/Katherine_Marlowe,Characters/Nathan_Drake,Characters/Ramses,Characters/Talbot_20657,Characters/Venom_Snake | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3647026-map-of-the-indian-ocean_png.png}}

{{Location | Name=Interstate 405 | Guid=3035-7978 | Deck=The I-405 Freeway is a major Southern California highway that connects most of Los Angeles. | Characters=Characters/Nick_Kang | Concepts= | Objects=Objects/Car,Objects/Helicopter,Objects/Police_Car,Objects/Taxi_Cab,Objects/Truck | Locations=Locations/Airport,Locations/Beach,Locations/California,Locations/Earth,Locations/Interstate_Highway_System,Locations/Irvine_California,Locations/Los_Angeles,Locations/North_America,Locations/San_Diego,Locations/Santa_Monica,Locations/The_Milky_Way_Galaxy,Locations/The_United_States_of_America,Locations/U_S_Route_101 | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3447818-i-405_%28ca%29.png}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3447818-i-405_(ca).png","path":"8\/82962\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_small,square_medium,scale_super,square_avatar,scale_medium,scale_small,square_tiny,square_mini,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> The I-405 Freeway is a major Southern California highway that connects most of Los Angeles.
